text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I accompany Sakura<n>Chiyono O to the
amusement park to<n>see if she's really gotten over
her<n>motion sickness.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I rode the train without any trouble!<n>But now
comes the real test.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I won't let all my efforts so far<n>go to waste!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: First up is the Ferris wheel!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Whirrrr... Whirrrr...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa. W-we're so high up. Ah,the view is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I was totally fine with that! This must<n>mean I'm
making progress, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay, next up is... the roller coaster!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: CHA-CHUNK, CHA-CHUNK

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoaaa! If I f-fell from here, I'd...<n>Oh gosh...
Ah... AAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hrk. W-well, I wouldn't call this<n>motion sickness...
It's more... pure<n>terror.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
N-no way. I'll never beat this by<n>taking breaks...
Onwards!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time, and I've saved the<n>hardest for
last... The teacups!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The teacup begins to move, then spin,<n>then slowly
but surely, it gets faster<n>and faster, until...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: SPIN! SPIN! SPIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Please! Make it stop!Ughhh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Thanks for letting me lean on<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It looks like... I've still got a long way<n>to go. A long,
long way...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh hey, you two! What brings you he—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh my goodness! Chiyo! Your face is<n>so pale!
What's the matter?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah, Maruzen?! I'm just, uh, well...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After hesitating a little, Sakura<n>Chiyono O opens up
about all the<n>things she's been trying to overcome
her motion sickness.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've... done it again. I brought up the<n>lamest thing
about me. You must think<n>I'm such a loser.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Not in the least! In fact, it's admirable<n>how hard
you're trying.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to be cool like you,<n>Maruzen. But
I'm so...
choice_data_list: Rome wasn't built in a day, you know.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to be cool like you,<n>Maruzen. But
I'm so...
choice_data_list: Rome wasn't built in a day, you know.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's true. It takes a lot of time and<n>effort to see
results.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's okay to give something all<n>you've got, but
don't rush yourself.<n>Go at your own speed. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's with the sad face? Oh,<n>your hair and
clothes are all messed<n>up.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Here, let me fix those for you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, your hair's so soft. I'm really<n>tempted to
stroke it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-you're welcome to! As much as<n>you'd like!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Come on now, stop squirming. Your<n>bow is
crooked too. Let me redo it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Okay!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: There, all done.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you very much! But I'm<n>sorry... for
making a scene again.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, chin up. If you wanna be cool,<n>you've
gotta act cool, every single<n>day.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Even if you fail, you gotta keep at it<n>until you're
the cool cat you wanna<n>be.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...R-right! I won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Maruzensky's advice,<n>Sakura Chiyono O
nods vigorously.<n>She may not have overcome her
condition yet, but I know one day<n>she'll turn things
around.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I... Well...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Don't push yourself too hard.<n>Everyone struggles
with something.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, I guess. I'm sorry for<n>dragging you into
this, though. I didn't<n>mean to...
choice_data_list: I'm helping because I want to.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you. Sorry, I shouldn't be<n>sulking, should
I?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Say, I've got an idea! How about we<n>go shopping
together next time, for a<n>change of pace?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Together?! Uh, but I, um...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, picture it—the two of us,<n>strolling about
and window shopping.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I could even pick out some radical<n>clothes for you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'd love to go shopping with you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I need to work hard on myself, so I<n>can pull off
those trendy outfits!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Though she hasn't overcome her<n>condition yet, it
seems like nothing will<n>stop Sakura Chiyono O
from<n>achieving her ambitions.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: No... No way! I'll never give up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Even if I couldn't totally overcome<n>my nausea, I
still improved a little.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So even if it's just a little better than<n>before, I'm
gonna keep doing what I<n>can!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's it. Know your limits and<n>just try your
best.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh...
choice_data_list: It's okay to make a little bit of progress at a time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, you're right. Both of you are.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I see now. I was in too much of a<n>hurry to get over
my motion sickness.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But I just really wanted to go for<n>drives with you,
Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Really?! That's why you were in such<n>a rush?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Agh! N-no, I-I mean...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you're so cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's no need to panic. I have<n>all the time
in the world for you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We'll take a ride together one day, I<n>just know it. I
promise we will.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It might take some time, but I willovercome my motion sicknesssomeday!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Until then, let's hang out with<n>our feet firmly
on the ground. I'm<n>sure we can have plenty of fun
that<n>way too!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's pale cheeks<n>flush red, and as
the two of them<n>smile at one another, I can't help
but<n>think they look alike.
